name: debar
description: A Hebrew pictograph study toolkit connecting Proto-Sinaitic/Phoenician letter pictures to biblical vocabulary and scripture text.

scripts.sync: rm -rf www && mkdir -p www/data/chinese www/pkg && cp *.html *.svg www/ && cp books.js chinese_books.js db.js gen1_data.js sw.js www/ && cp narratives.json manifest.json www/ && cp data/*.json www/data/ && cp data/chinese/*.json www/data/chinese/ && cp pkg/hebrew.js pkg/hebrew_bg.wasm www/pkg/ && npx cap sync android
scripts.build:debug: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:release: npm run sync && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease
